assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets TokenCleanupBatchSize = 500 on the operational store options
Program.cs sets ConsumedTokenCleanupDelay = 600 on the operational store options
Program.cs sets FuzzTokenCleanupStart = true on the operational store options
assertions.rationale: Does not set FuzzTokenCleanupStart. This is important for the 3-instance deployment.

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets DefaultSchema to 'identity_ops' on the operational store options
Program.cs sets TokenCleanupInterval = 900 and EnableTokenCleanup = true
